exceptions.reason: The <button> only renders when removable is true ({removable && <button>...</button>}). Without it -- the common case -- Tag is a plain <span> with no button, no role and no interactivity at all, and this whole pattern does not apply; it would bind none instead. This binding, and every exception in it including the one below, describes Tag only in the shape it takes when removable is set.

The remove button has no disabled concept at all -- aria-disabled is never set, and there is no prop to make removal unavailable while still visible. It is either rendered (fully enabled) or not rendered at all.
